title: BEM-957 runner inspection
objective: BEM-957 | Runner inspection before commit_sha patch. Inspect .github/workflows/codex-runner.yml and any safe push helper referenced by it. Create file governance/reports/BEM957_RUNNER_INSPECTION_REPORT.md containing: 1) exact order of steps from Execute task through Write result files through Commit and push everything; 2) where result JSON is written relative to git commit and push; 3) where commit_sha is assigned or not assigned; 4) whether unstaged changes before rebase can still cause safe push failure; 5) minimal next patch recommendation. Include canonical counts: Этап 8/9 (89%), BEM-931 foundation 14/14 (100%), release gates 0/4. No release PASS. No issue comments.
